  "findings": [
    "DP impulse lines sloped incorrectly for the process service",
    "Gas taps installed below the pipe centerline, risking liquid accumulation",
    "Liquid taps installed on top of the pipe, risking gas pocket entrapment"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-route and re-slope the impulse lines according to API RP 551 guidelines",
    "Relocate gas taps to the top or upper 45 degrees of the process line",
    "Relocate liquid taps to the side or lower 45 degrees of the process line"
  ],
  "rationale": "The DP transmitter impulse lines are sloped incorrectly for their respective services. For gas service, taps must be on top of the pipe to prevent liquid accumulation in the lines. For liquid service, taps must be on the side or bottom to prevent gas pockets from being trapped. This classic installation error will lead to measurement errors and process control issues.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 551 Section 4.2 (Impulse Line Routing and Sloping)",
    "Manufacturer Installation Manuals for DP Transmitters"
  ]
}
